comment: Quality Gates catalog -- subjective dimension (cross-dimension per quality/catalogs/README.md). Schema spec: quality/catalogs/README.md. Verifier impl: .claude/skills/reposix-quality-review/. Reports: quality/reports/verifications/subjective/. P61 Wave A catalog-first commit -- 3 rubric rows + short-lived waivers tracked_in P61 Wave G.

asserts: the doc-clarity-review subagent verdict for README.md hero (lines 1-50) is CLEAR (numeric score >= 7 on the 10-pt scale where CLEAR=10, NEEDS-WORK=5, CONFUSING=2)
the doc-clarity-review subagent verdict for docs/index.md hero (lines 1-50) is CLEAR (numeric score >= 7)
the verdict artifact at quality/reports/verifications/subjective/cold-reader-hero-clarity.json contains {ts, score, verdict, rationale, evidence_files} per the dimension README JSON shape

rows.owner_hint: if RED: README.md hero or docs/index.md hero confused the cold reader -- read the rubric artifact at quality/reports/verifications/subjective/cold-reader-hero-clarity.json for the friction points + rewrite the offending paragraphs. Common: jargon-heavy first paragraph; missing pitch; install command buried.

waiver.reason: P61 Wave A catalog-first; rubric implementation skill ships in P61 Waves C-E (SKILL.md + dispatch helper + 3 rubric impls). Until Wave G runs the dispatch end-to-end and persists the artifact, the runner returns NOT-VERIFIED on missing skill; this short-lived waiver keeps pre-release cadence GREEN through the implementation window. Pattern from quality/SURPRISES.md 2026-04-27 P58 row 2 (clippy-lint-loaded P58 Wave A waiver) and P60 Wave A (8 short-lived waivers).

sources: CLAUDE.md:Freshness invariants -- Install path leads with package manager

asserts: the rubric subagent confirms README.md hero install snippet leads with `cargo binstall` OR `brew install` OR `cargo install` (NOT `git clone && cargo build`) per CLAUDE.md freshness-invariants
the rubric subagent confirms docs/index.md hero install snippet leads with the same package-manager-first ordering

numeric score >= 7 on a 1-10 scale where 10 = leads with package manager + cites supported targets + names the binstall fallback path; 5 = leads with package manager but missing target list; 2 = leads with git-clone+build
the verdict artifact at quality/reports/verifications/subjective/install-positioning.json contains {ts, score, verdict, rationale, evidence_files} per the dimension README JSON shape

rows.owner_hint: if RED: README.md or docs/index.md install copy regressed (perhaps a refactor moved the package-manager command below a git-clone snippet). Restore package-manager-first ordering per CLAUDE.md freshness invariants. Cross-check with structure/install-path-leads-with-pm in freshness-invariants.json.

waiver.reason: P61 Wave A catalog-first; rubric implementation skill ships in P61 Waves C-E (SKILL.md + dispatch helper + 3 rubric impls). Until Wave G runs the dispatch end-to-end and persists the artifact, the runner returns NOT-VERIFIED on missing skill; this short-lived waiver keeps pre-release cadence GREEN through the implementation window. Pattern from quality/SURPRISES.md 2026-04-27 P58 row 2 and P60 Wave A.

asserts: the rubric subagent cross-checks every headline number in README.md + docs/index.md against the source-of-truth artifacts in benchmarks/ + docs/benchmarks/ -- and confirms drift is <= 2pp for percentage claims OR within stated confidence interval for absolute numbers

numeric score >= 7 on a 1-10 scale where 10 = every headline number cites a benchmarks/ artifact and value is current; 5 = some numbers cite source but are stale (3-5pp drift); 2 = numbers stand alone with no source citation

the verdict artifact at quality/reports/verifications/subjective/headline-numbers-sanity.json contains {ts, score, verdict, rationale, evidence_files} + a per-headline-number table (number | source-file:line | source-of-truth-file | drift)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: a headline number drifted from the benchmarks/ source-of-truth (typical: a perf optimization landed and bench output updated, but the README/docs hero copy was not synced). Update the README + docs hero numbers OR refresh the benchmarks artifact (whichever is the actual ground truth).

waiver.reason: P61 Wave A catalog-first; rubric implementation skill ships in P61 Waves C-E (SKILL.md + dispatch helper + 3 rubric impls). Until Wave G runs the dispatch end-to-end and persists the artifact, the runner returns NOT-VERIFIED on missing skill; this short-lived waiver keeps weekly cadence GREEN through the implementation window.
